name: control-mapping freshness gate: --apply-to-controls auto-demotes affected entries in compliance/controls.yaml when their source is stale (status transitions to pending-stale-source)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && printf "- framework: nist-csf-2
  control_id: GV.OC
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule:g-x-001]
  legal_review_status: reviewed_by:legal:2026-01-01
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/control-mapping-gate.sh" --controls-file "$PWD/controls.yaml" --apply-to-controls --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z && grep -E "pending-stale-source" controls.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
